'''jabuzhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:swaddy|swaddy]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-b-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:swaddy|swaddy]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| jabuzhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:jæbizhith|jæbizhith]] || [[word:jæbizhij|jæbizhij]] || [[word:jæbizhish|jæbizhish]] || [[word:jæbizhi|jæbizhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:jabubuzhuth|jabubuzhuth]] || [[word:jabubuzhuj|jabubuzhuj]] || [[word:jabubuzhush|jabubuzhush]] || [[word:jabubuzhu|jabubuzhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:jabuzhuth|jabuzhuth]] || [[word:jabuzhuj|jabuzhuj]] || [[word:jabuzhush|jabuzhush]] || [[word:jabuzhu|jabuzhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:jabufzhuth|jabufzhuth]] || [[word:jabufzhuj|jabufzhuj]] || [[word:jabufzhush|jabufzhush]] || [[word:jabufzhuf|jabufzhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:jabuzhuthu|jabuzhuthu]] || [[word:jabuzhuju|jabuzhuju]] || [[word:jabuzhushu|jabuzhushu]] || [[word:jabuzhuku|jabuzhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:jabuzhuth|jabuzhuth]] || [[word:jabuzhuj|jabuzhuj]] || [[word:jabuzhush|jabuzhush]] || [[word:jabuzhu|jabuzhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:jabuzhuthul|jabuzhuthul]] || [[word:jabuzhujul|jabuzhujul]] || [[word:jabuzhushul|jabuzhushul]] || [[word:jabuzhukul|jabuzhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:jabuzhuthuthu|jabuzhuthuthu]] || [[word:jabuzhujuju|jabuzhujuju]] || [[word:jabuzhushushu|jabuzhushushu]] || [[word:jabuzhuku|jabuzhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:jabuzhuthun|jabuzhuthun]] || [[word:jabuzhujun|jabuzhujun]] || [[word:jabuzhushun|jabuzhushun]] || [[word:jabuzhukun|jabuzhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:jabuzhuthuoro|jabuzhuthuoro]] || [[word:jabuzhujuoro|jabuzhujuoro]] || [[word:jabuzhushuoro|jabuzhushuoro]] || [[word:jabuzhukuoro|jabuzhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a249b1f}}
